title: The Beast of Millbrook
description: Something large and dangerous has been stalking the woods near Millbrook. Livestock mutilated, travelers disappearing. The locals are terrified. Track down the beast and end its reign of terror. This is a Veteran-level contract - succeed and you'll earn the promotion.

objectives.description: Speak to locals in Millbrook about the beast
Track the beast to its lair
Take a trophy from the beast

notes: Rank: Member → Veteran (promotion). Monster hunt with tracking mechanics. Dire wolf spawns in den near Millbrook. Promotion to Veteran rank on completion.
